title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repository providing the core CLI and server to pull and run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python library for integrating Ollama models into Python applications with async support.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, installable via npm, works in Node and browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama allowing local LLM chains, agents, and retrieval pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (renamed to Open WebUI) with chat history, model management, and RAG plugins.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library for Ollama with fluent API and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI wrapper with conversation memory and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot-style plugin that uses local Ollama models for code completion.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake providing Ollama binaries and module for declarative configuration on NixOS.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama API.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal Next.js chat interface using Ollama and Vercel AI SDK for quick local prototyping.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration enabling Ollama models in deepset pipelines for RAG and search.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET library for Ollama with async streaming and dependency-injection friendly clients.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Collection of Docker Compose stacks bundling Ollama with WebUI, Milvus, Weaviate, and monitoring.
